The '''Corestrike Rancor''' was a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]] produced during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was very popular among [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] and [[Thug/Legends|thugs]].

[[Zheus|Exemplar Zheus]] owned such weapon during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Star Wars: Galaxies'' uses the same 3D model for the Corestrike Rancor and [[Nym's slugthrower-carbine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
